headline: Royal Caribbean Cruises Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Royal Caribbean Cruises (NYSE:RCL) executives told investors the company delivered a first quarter that exceeded internal expectations, supported by what management called a “record wave season,” strong onboard spending, and continued demand for its portfolio of vacation brands. headline: Why Carnival (CCL) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of cruise ship company Carnival (NYSE:CCL) jumped 3.8% in the afternoon session after its peer, Royal Caribbean Group, reported strong first-quarter results that exceeded expectations, signaling strength in the cruise industry.
